name: Island Vintage Coffee
tagline: 100% Kona coffee, acai bowls the size of your head, and the best iced latte in Waikiki — tourist-friendly but genuinely good.
mustOrder: Mauna Kea Iced Coffee — Kona coffee, coconut gelato, black lava sea salt
Acai Bowl — massive, loaded with granola and fresh fruit
parking: Royal Hawaiian Center validated parking or street meters on Kalakaua Ave
talkStory: Yes, it's in a Waikiki mall, and yes, tourists pack it — but the coffee is genuinely excellent. They use 100% Hawaiian-grown beans (not blends) and roast in small batches. The Mauna Kea Iced Coffee with a scoop of coconut gelato and black lava sea salt is iconic. Their acai bowls are also some of the best on the island — huge portions. Multiple locations across Oahu (Ko Olina, Ala Moana) but the Royal Hawaiian Center original has the most energy. Expect a line at peak hours.
